system.description: You become the living proof of the Sutra's promise. For 1 round: all your Attack cards deal maximum base damage (no variance — the number is fixed at its highest value). You cannot be reduced below 1 HP by any single hit. Your Basic Attack deals +RESONANCE damage. Enemies who hit you with melee attacks take 10 + RESONANCE damage as feedback. After this round, gain Overheat 2 and lose 8 HP (the cost of perfect expression).
